name: Zion Golf Club and BBQ & Bar
about: Zion Golf Club & Bistro is an indoor golf facility and bar located in Scottsdale, Arizona. The venue utilizes TrackMan 4 simulators with dual radar technology for accurate shot tracking, allowing for golf regardless of weather conditions. It operates on a membership model with different tiers offering varying numbers of private one-hour sessions. The facility combines a high-tech golfing environment with a full-service bistro, providing food and drink options for members and guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan 4 simulators with dual radar technology for high accuracy
Membership-based exclusivity ensuring no crowded greens and guaranteed access to bays
Flexible scheduling allows booking a bay for any date and time to fit your schedule
State-of-the-art facility with an in-house bistro for food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: In-house bistro available with a menu offering BBQ items, smoked brisket sliders, and loaded fries.
Full bar service available at the bistro.

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar technology for enhanced data accuracy

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The rules state players are responsible for equipment inside the simulators, implying you should bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, food and drinks must be kept at the provided tables. No food or drink is allowed inside the simulator at any time.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue appears focused on a serious golf and adult atmosphere; it does not explicitly market itself as kid-friendly.
